An arsenal is literally a building

but it's also used to refer
to a collection
of weapons that someone could use.

You'll see arsenal

Yes. We use arsenal metaphorically
in more everyday contexts to talk

about the skills or attributes

For example, in sports,

that means the science that causes

Yes. And we can use behind in

Yes, taint is
a verb which means to spoil something
or to make it unpleasant.

Russia's president.

This means the allegations

We commonly see taint used to talk
about reputations,

but other things can be tainted too,
such as memories.

For example, if you fall out
or argue with a friend,

it could taint
all your good memories together.
Taint is the verb,

but we can also describe something
using the adjective tainted,

and this means spoiled
or made unpleasant.

For example, my friend's partner
